title: Manage utilities and energy
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage utilities and energy demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify enterprise utility and energy requirements and costs

pcs.text: Identify utility and energy requirements for all areas and operations of the enterprise in accordance with workplace, customer and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify utility and energy requirements for all areas and operations of the enterprise in accordance with workplace, customer and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify utility and energy requirements for all areas and operations of the enterprise in accordance with workplace, customer and regulatory requirements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure current utility and energy costs, and identify impact on profitability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure current utility and energy costs, and identify impact on profitability.

pcs.text: Determine enterprise's future utility or energy requirements in accordance with enterprise goals and directions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine enterprise's future utility or energy requirements in accordance with enterprise goals and directions.

pcs.text: Include utility and energy requirements and costs in all forward planning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Include utility and energy requirements and costs in all forward planning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Include utility and energy requirements and costs in all forward planning.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare contingency plans for failure of utility or energy supply and service.
